title: Core entity + UI view-model + Result/Error types

task.description: Add strict TS types for Habit, CheckIn, Subscription, HabitRecommendation plus Result/Ok/Err and repo/api error unions. Include Today + Stats view-model types so UI can consume typed data without casting.
acceptance_criteria: AC1: src/lib/types/models.ts exports Habit, CheckIn, SubscriptionTier, Subscription, HabitRecommendation with fields/types exactly matching SPEC (incl. date formats as string).
AC2: src/lib/types/viewModels.ts exports TodayHabitItem, WeeklyDayStat, WeeklyHabitBreakdown, MonthlyDayStat, HabitPatternStat with no runtime code.
AC3: src/lib/types/result.ts exports Ok<T>, Err<E>, Result<T,E> as discriminated unions with an 'ok' boolean discriminator.
AC4: src/lib/types/errors.ts exports RepoError and ApiError unions including at least {type:'db'}, {type:'network'}, {type:'unknown'} shapes.
AC5: Running TypeScript in strict mode has 0 errors and no 'any' is introduced in these files.

definition_of_done: All exports are usedable by other modules without circular deps.
